name: Dash
description: Offline API documentation browser and code snippet manager for macOS, iOS with 200+ docsets.

seo.title: Dash — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Dash: Offline API documentation browser and code snippet manager for macOS, iOS with 200+ docsets.

when_to_use: Offline API reference lookup while coding without internet
Snippet library for frequently reused code patterns
Multi-language docset search from a single keyboard shortcut
Integrating framework docs into macOS Spotlight search
Fast documentation lookup without switching browser tabs

cons: Competes with free web docs improvements
review.verdict: A staple for offline-first developers — worth it if you actually code on planes or in weak-wifi cafes.
review.best_for: macOS developers who value offline docs and quick snippet recall
review.not_for: Always-online devs who are fine with MDN or official web docs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock
